title: Refactor rules-engine evaluation to async
author: david
description: Refactors the fraud rules-engine evaluation path from sync to async. Adds backpressure via a bounded queue. Rayan reviewed and approved with two minor follow-ups (per-rule circuit breaker tracked separately in FRAUD-156). My first significant PR on the platform — paired with Rayan to map out the design before writing code.

title: Add deploy-preview comments to PRs touching service.yaml
author: david
description: Small DX win — when a PR touches `service.yaml`, post a comment with a diff-rendered preview of the resulting Helm chart values. Saves reviewers from running `helm template` locally to sanity-check.
